textPlain: [This](https://youtu.be/5qS5lqbx9H0?si=kCMq9fQIdUJY3evE) is GENDY3, the piece this monograph is about. Xenakis wrote it using a BASIC program called GENDYN and, if I understood correctly (from the pdf, p. 10), this composition was "direct to disk": no midi, no abstractions, no nothing, just sound waves. A bit like that joke of the programmer who flips bits directly.
